column2: # Relabel clusters per stimulus based on centroid y position
# Lower y value = higher on screen = eyes
# Higher y value = lower on screen = mouth
arrange(cy, .by_group = TRUE) %>%  # sort ascending by y within each stimulus
row_number() == 1 ~ "eyes",   # lowest y = highest on screen = eyes
row_number() == 2 ~ "mouth",  # highest y = lowest on screen = mouth
# Quick sanity check - look at a few to confirm
